introLines.text: Uh, hi Vern. I think I maybe saw something? In the sky?
So like, I don't know if this counts, but there was this... thing.
First time caller. Long time listener. I saw a UFO. I think. Maybe.

detailLines.text: It was... a light? Or maybe two lights. Could've been one. It was moving. Or hovering. One of those.
I don't really remember where exactly. Outside somewhere. At night. Or evening. Definitely dark-ish.
The size? Um. Big? Medium? It was far away. Or close. Hard to tell with perspective and stuff.

defenseLines.text: I mean, it could have been a plane. But it felt different. In my gut. You know?
Look, I know I'm not great with details, but something was there. Probably.
My sister saw it too but she says it was a helicopter. But she's wrong. I think.

acceptanceLines.text: Oh, okay. Yeah. That makes sense.
Right, that's what I thought. Probably. Maybe.

conclusionLines.text: Okay, thanks Vern. Sorry I couldn't be more specific.
I'll call back if I remember more details. If I do. Which I might not.
